title: fdv3.1 SQL Ordered by Reads - Top 10

list.name: dbname
list.label: Database
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.name: end_snap
list.label: End Snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

options.content: ⬅ Return to Navigation  |  , 🔄 Reset Filters

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_sql AS 
(  SELECT sql_id, AVG(reads_per_exec) AS reads_per_exec  
FROM awr_sql_reads  
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''    
AND dbname = '$dbname'    AND instance = '$instance'    
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int 
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int 
AND reads_per_exec > 1000 
AND executions > 100 
GROUP BY sql_id  
ORDER BY    CASE      WHEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int = split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int        
THEN MAX(reads_per_exec)      
ELSE AVG(reads_per_exec)    
END DESC  LIMIT 10) 
SELECT   s.sql_id,  SUM(s.executions) AS executions,  ROUND(AVG(s.pct_cpu),2) AS pct_cpu,  ROUND(AVG(s.pct_io),2) AS pct_io,  ROUND(AVG(s.reads_per_exec),4) AS reads_per_exec 
FROM awr_sql_reads s 
JOIN top_sql t ON t.sql_id = s.sql_id 
WHERE dbname = '$dbname'  
AND instance = '$instance'  
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int 
GROUP BY s.sql_id 
ORDER BY reads_per_exec DESC;

WITH top_sql AS 
(  SELECT sql_id  
FROM awr_sql_reads  
WHERE '$dbname' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''    
AND dbname = '$dbname'     AND instance = '$instance'     
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int 
AND reads_per_exec > 1000
AND executions > 100    
GROUP BY sql_id   
ORDER BY     CASE       WHEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int = split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int         
THEN MAX(reads_per_exec)       
ELSE AVG(reads_per_exec)     END DESC   LIMIT 10 ) 
SELECT DISTINCT ON (t.sql_id)   t.sql_id,  x.sql_text 
FROM top_sql t 
JOIN awr_sql_text x ON x.sql_id = t.sql_id 
WHERE x.dbname = '$dbname' 
ORDER BY t.sql_id, x.id DESC;
